RECORD ON APPEAL Court Judgment-Small Claims Appeal
Off Calendar Sep-06-2007 Set For Trial On Sep-06-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 002

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-06-2007 Continued To Sep-06-07 At 09:45 A.M. In Dept 206

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-06-2007 Judgment Entered

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-02-2007 Continued To Sep-06-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 9:20am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals. Adelaida Caburian appears as appellant in Pro Per; Sama Sandura appears on behalf of respondent Charita B. Repollo, to request a continuance.
Ms. Adelaida is assisted in translating Tagalug to English by Sama Sandy. For good cause the matter is continued to Sep-06-07, 9am. Ms. Adelaida signs the stip and order allowing Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles to hear the case.
